title: Youtube Poop: The Evil King Part 1
description:
Part 2: Completed 100% (The Link is at the end of this video or just go on my channel to watch it)

So first of all before someone start asking about it.

1: I know my grammar suck and all so if you don't like it well just don't read it. =P

2: The sound is high and quite ears rape at some point....if is not during most of the video. 

The reason is at first the sound was way to low and we could not hear The King talk or anyone else. 

(That's what happend when you make a video part by part....) 

So i did alot of editing and it turned out like this so i think is better to have a high volume video that a video where you have to put your volume to max to hear it.

(And anyway i ALWAYS fail at sound quality in almost all my video XD!)

3: Yes i got most of my idea for this video from the Youtube Poop called Final Spaghetti but the story is different.

4: When part 2 is going to come out? "I don't know when i am going to have free time to finish it."

5: The King voice is from the character from Soul Calibur 3 "Nightmare" i tried to find better quality for his voice but i could not find a video without gay music with his voice so that's why you can hear music from Soul Calibur 3 when The King talk.

6: Nope this have nothing to do with The last stand against WeeGee is a whole different story.

I hope you enjoy the video.

"SONG LIST"

1: Final Fantasy VI - Opening Theme 

2: The Last Remnant - Nisus

3: Final Fantasy VII -  Mako Reactor

4: Final Fantasy VII - World Crisis

5: Chrono Trigger - Lavos Theme

"END OF THE SONG LIST"

Know the game MyBrute? It can be a fun little game where you make a character and have him fight in a arena VS other people character it is free and very simple to play with.

I'm looking for pupils! Yes, if you are interested in becoming my pupils on Mybrute well just go on this link make a character and start to fight in the arena. ^^

Here the link

http://dontmoveanddiiie.mybrute.com
